title: Jayabheri Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Jayabheri Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!
